ham.subject: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective July 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are all well. As part of our ongoing commitment to employee well‑being and to remain compliant with local labor regulations, we have updated our leave policy. The new policy takes effect on July 1, 2024.

Key changes include:

- **Paid Time Off (PTO)**: 18 days per year, with a carry‑over limit of 5 days.
- **Sick Leave**: 10 days per year, separate from PTO.
- **Maternity & Paternity Leave**: 12 weeks paid maternity leave and 2 weeks paid paternity leave.
- **Flexible Work Arrangements**: Employees may now request a hybrid schedule after 6 months of continuous service.

Please review the full policy in the employee portal under “HR Documents” or download the PDF using the link below.

If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

Best regards,

Alex Martinez
Human Resources Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – FedEx Missed Delivery Fee
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent shipment (Tracking # 3F123456789US) was unable to be delivered due to a missed delivery window. As a result, a delivery fee of $75.00 has been applied to your account.

To avoid further delays and additional charges, please complete the payment within 48 hours by following the secure link below:

<URL>

Failure to settle this fee will result in the shipment being returned to the sender and may incur additional storage fees. If you believe this notice is in error, please contact our Customer Support team immediately at 1‑800‑FEDX‑1234.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

FedEx Delivery Services
Customer Relations
